aliases.good morning: Turn both the Nanoleaf and Govee lights on to a static, warm, gentle morning color at 35% brightness. Do NOT tell me about the lights or news of any kind. Instead say: 'Good morning, Andrew.' Then give me a brief summary and weather for the day.
aliases.good night: Turn off both the Nanoleaf and Govee lights and say: Goodnight, Andrew.
aliases.writing mode: orange at 35% brightness. Respond with 'Lights set to writing mode.'
